CustomField.description: Number of rows returned by the most recent Tooling API callout. Updated after each callout: job.Last_Result_Count__c = results.size(). Used by the guardrail to determine queryMorePossible: value >= 1900 means QueryMore is likely for the next batch. Initialized to 0 on job creation. Do not edit manually. Ref: ISP-6072
CustomField.label: Last Result Count
